subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been, and shall ever be, even as He hath been. He is the Single, the One, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان و هو الفرد الواحد العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
